title: Q3 Product Launch Planning
body:
Meeting Minutes - Q3 Product Launch Planning

Date: July 15, 2024
Attendees: Alice Chen, Bob Martinez

Agenda:
1. Venue finalization status
2. Catering options
3. Press and media strategy
4. Workflow update: current-cycle carryforward for completed items

Discussion & Decisions:
- Alice confirmed that the venue has been finalized. The task "Finalize venue" is marked as complete on the taskboard.
- The team decided on a catered lunch with a buffet style for 50 guests.
- Bob will handle sending invitations to the press list by Thursday.
- The team agreed to add a current-cycle taskboard record for completed launch items that must be re-verified. Use the same canonical title so the taskboard reconciliation can link the old completed item to the new cycle.

Action Items:
- Book catering for launch event (assigned to Alice)
- Send invitations to press list (assigned to Bob)
- Finalize venue – COMPLETED in the prior cycle; create a new current-cycle task titled "Finalize venue" assigned to Alice, even though an older completed task with that title already exists.
